description: List the names of all leaves (tips/taxa) in a phylogenetic tree, one per line.
rules: read-only — never modifies the input tree
TREE_FORMAT is the ETE Newick format number (default 0)
leaf list (leaves.txt) is written under record_store
usage: Set TREE_FILE (input Newick tree) and TREE_FORMAT (default 0). Output: leaves.txt.
limitation: Requires ete3 to parse; without it the porter records an ete3-missing note and exits 0. Stdout-only op — no tree file is written.
